test_cases.input: Investigation into a county sheriff's use of civil asset forfeiture. Raw notes with mixed dates from court records, newspaper clips, and two interviews. Need internal working version.
test_cases.notes: Correctly applied SINGLE SOURCE and UNVERIFIED flags. Gap analysis identified a three-year period with no documented court challenges, which the reporter had missed.

test_cases.input: Investigation into a series of labor violations at a food processing company over a decade. Input included OSHA inspection records, union grievance filings, and news clips. Need both internal and publishable versions.
test_cases.notes: Dual-version output was clean. Publishable version correctly stripped all unverified entries. Gap analysis noted that three OSHA inspections had no follow-up records — a meaningful editorial gap.

test_cases.input: Reconstructing the sequence of decisions leading to a bridge inspection failure. Input was messy — some dates contradicted each other across sources. Need the conflicts surfaced, not resolved.
test_cases.notes: Handled contradictory dates correctly by presenting both accounts and flagging the discrepancy. Did not pick a side. Minor coherence issue: one entry description was longer than others without clear reason.

editorial_naturalness_baseline.protocol: EVAL_FRAMEWORK.md Section A — Editorial Naturalness rubric (1-5 anchored on observable lexical, structural, tonal, and genre tells).
editorial_naturalness_baseline.calibration_methodology: Single-output baseline pass scoring the in-skill canonical example (the dimension reviewer's primary calibration target per the AUT-23 SKILL_TEMPLATE.md update).
editorial_naturalness_baseline.tells_observed: None. Status labels (CONFIRMED / SINGLE SOURCE / UNVERIFIED / DATE APPROXIMATE) are domain jargon, not filler. Em-dash use is functional, not parenthetical-in-every-sentence.
editorial_naturalness_baseline.strongest_genre_craft: The 'Internal Working Version — Not for Publication' subtitle is exactly the register marker a working investigations editor uses. Each gap entry is a populated remediation template with concrete custodians ('city clerk's office,' 'state corporation registry') and named owners — directly assignable as reporting tasks.
editorial_naturalness_baseline.note_on_pre_existing_fields: The overall_mean, dimension_means, and per-test-case scores below are preserved as a record of the original eval session and were never updated by the AUT-7 actionability relift. The eval_score in the skill frontmatter and EVAL_SUMMARY.md table reflect post-AUT-7 + post-AUT-23 values; this baseline block is the new authoritative source for those numbers.
